mapper.select: SELECT p.ID, p.CERTIFI_TYPE, p.CERTIFI_CODE, p.CERTIFICATE_NAME, p.CERTIFI_NUMBER, p.CERTIFI_USER, p.CERTIFI_USER_NAME, p.EXPIRE_DATE, p.VALID_DATE, p.CERTIFI_STATE, p.FIRST_DATE, p.REMARK, p.DEL_FLAG, p.USE_ORG_ID, p.USE_ORG_NAME, p.CERTIFICATION_AUTHORITY, p.EXAM_ORG, p.IS_EMPLOY, p.CREATE_BY, p.CREATE_BY_NAME, p.CREATE_TIME, p.UPDATE_BY, p.UPDATE_BY_NAME, p.UPDATE_TIME, p.DELETE_BY, p.DELETE_BY_NAME, p.DELETE_TIME FROM M_PECIAL_PERSON p WHERE p.ID = #{id} AND p.DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_PECIAL_PERSON ( ID, CERTIFI_TYPE, CERTIFI_CODE, CERTIFICATE_NAME, CERTIFI_NUMBER, CERTIFI_USER, CERTIFI_USER_NAME, EXPIRE_DATE, VALID_DATE, CERTIFI_STATE, FIRST_DATE, REMARK, USE_ORG_ID, USE_ORG_NAME, CERTIFICATION_AUTHORITY, EXAM_ORG, IS_EMPLOY, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, DEL_FLAG ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{certifiType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{certifiCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{certificateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{certifiNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{certifiUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{certifiUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expireDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{validDate,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{certifiState,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useOrgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{useOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{certificationAuthority,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{examOrg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isEmploy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_PECIAL_PERSON
CERTIFI_TYPE = #{certifiType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CERTIFI_CODE = #{certifiCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CERTIFICATE_NAME = #{certificateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CERTIFI_NUMBER = #{certifiNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CERTIFI_USER = #{certifiUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CERTIFI_USER_NAME = #{certifiUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EXPIRE_DATE = #{expireDate,jdbcType=DATE},
VALID_DATE = #{validDate,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
CERTIFI_STATE = #{certifiState,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
FIRST_DATE = #{firstDate,jdbcType=DATE},
REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USE_ORG_ID = #{useOrgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
USE_ORG_NAME = #{useOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CERTIFICATION_AUTHORITY = #{certificationAuthority,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EXAM_ORG = #{examOrg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_EMPLOY = #{isEmploy,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE M_PECIAL_PERSON SET DEL_FLAG = 1, DELETE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DELETE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DELETE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id}
